raw_user_request: Add regression tests for the existing timer browser extension.
concrete_goal: Add unit and integration test coverage to the existing timer extension codebase for start, pause, reset, and toggle controls without changing product behavior.
success_criteria: Tests cover the existing timer extension start, pause, reset, and mode toggle behavior.
Tests verify persisted timer state and invalid duration handling in the current codebase.
No user-facing timer UI, extension workflow, or product behavior is changed.
scope_in: Tests for existing timer extension modules and popup behavior.
Minimal test fixtures or mocks needed to exercise existing timer state.
scope_out: New timer features, UI redesign, product copy changes, browser store packaging, and production deployment.
assumptions: The repository already contains the timer extension implementation.
Existing test tooling can run locally without adding paid services.
implementation_constraints: Keep changes limited to tests and test fixtures.
Do not alter the existing extension runtime behavior.

scenario_flows.name: Test existing timer controls
preconditions: The existing timer extension code and test harness are present.
steps: Add tests that exercise start, pause, reset, and toggle behavior through existing APIs.
Run the focused timer extension test command.
Confirm the test output reports the covered behavior without source UI changes.
scenario_flows.expected_result: The existing timer extension behavior is covered by passing tests and product files remain unchanged except fixtures if needed.
failure_or_edge_cases: Invalid duration state is covered by a regression test.
Persisted timer state is covered across a simulated reload.

verification_matrix.build: Run the existing build command only if the repository normally requires it for tests.
verification_matrix.lint: Run lint or equivalent static checks when present.
verification_matrix.test: Run the focused timer extension regression tests.
verification_matrix.run: Manual app run is not required because this is test-only work against an existing codebase.
verification_matrix.behavior_check: Review test assertions for start, pause, reset, toggle, invalid duration, and persisted state coverage.

acceptance_evidence_plan: Focused test command output showing the existing timer extension regression tests pass.
Diff review showing changes are limited to tests or test fixtures and do not alter the product UI.
iteration_policy: Rework until the tests pass and changes stay test-only.

delegation_plan_seed.objective: Add regression tests for the existing timer extension.
